# QA Report — 001-privacy-badge-auditable-zero-tracking-guarantee

**Status:** APPROVED
**Generated By:** Auto-Claude AI Review
**Date:** 2026-03-09T09:41:02.238Z

## Summary
Privacy badge implementation fully satisfies all acceptance criteria and both planned subtasks. The badge is visible without user interaction, communicates the zero-tracking guarantee via three clear pills, includes a working View Source link using the view-source: protocol, adds no external resources, and adapts to narrow (375px+) viewports via a column layout at max-width: 480px.

## Validations
- Badge div placed immediately after .tagline <p> element, visible on page load without interaction
- Three pill spans present: '🔒 No cookies', '🚫 No tracking', '👤 No account required' — covering cookies, tracking/external requests, and account requirement
- View Source anchor (#view-source-link) present with inline script setting href to 'view-source:' + location.href
- .privacy-badge uses light-green tint background (#f0faf2), green border (#c3e6cb), flex layout, and small font (0.78rem)
- .pill + .pill::before dot-separator pseudo-element implemented correctly
- .view-source is underlined, font-weight: 600, and green (#2d6a3f) matching badge palette
- @media (max-width: 480px) switches .privacy-badge to flex-direction: column and tightens .privacy-pills gap to 4px 6px
- Diff adds only CSS and HTML — no analytics, tracking scripts, external fonts, or CDN resources introduced

## Issues
- No blocking issues found
